profile.bio_voice_summary: McDonald's KSA (@mcdonaldsksa) — Central/Eastern/Northern Saudi regions. International QSR brand with notable Saudi market localization.

distinctive_visual_traits: rendered stadium graphics for football content
group employee photos with branded backdrops
product-on-white or product-on-yellow — clinical fast food template
distinctive_voice_traits: brand tagline: منكم وفيكم (From you, for you)
anti_patterns_observed: global QSR template dominates — no Najdi/heritage visual identity
product photography is clinical flat-lay, not craft-driven or contextual
no warmth hospitality cues (no كرم الضيافة, no majlis references)
football/sports content is local but not specifically Najdi/cultural
discount mechanics identical to global McDonald's playbook
